name: Tax-Exempt Status for Charitable Organizations

eligibility.description: Must be organized and operated exclusively for exempt purposes, ensure no net earnings inure to private individuals, and refrain from political campaign intervention.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts corporations, funds, or foundations from federal income tax if they are organized and operated exclusively for religious, charitable, scientific, or educational purposes.
